question: What is the relative position of the woman holding the small child and the boy in the foreground? Select from the following options: (A) The woman and the boy are back to back. (B) The woman is on the right of the boy. (C) The woman and the boy are facing each other. (D) The woman is on the left of the boy.
gold_answer: The woman is on the left of the boy
answer_choices: The woman and the boy are back to back
The woman is on the right of the boy
The woman and the boy are facing each other
The woman is on the left of the boy

qwen_prompt_object.inpaint_prompt: a boy standing to the left of the woman, facing forward
qwen_prompt_object.negative_prompt: woman on the right of the boy, boy on the right of the woman
